meaning: adj.生动的,鲜明的,鲜艳的,大胆的,清晰的,活泼的,逼真的
examples: The report paints a vivid picture of life in the city.
He gave a vivid account of his life as a fighter pilot.
His eyes were a vivid green.
Bigelow and her cinematographer, Adrian Biddle, establish vivid contrasting looks for the historical and present-day action.
Some who had been witnesses or otherwise involved still maintain vivid memories of the process.
